title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at HDFC Ergo

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at HDFC Ergo
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, HDFC Ergo in Pune is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About HDFC Ergo:
HDFC Ergo is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Ergo!
